title: Tokens, Source Spans, Document Trees, Invariants, and Traversal · Scenario Checkpoint
summary: A release reviewer compares near-miss decisions for tokens, source spans, document trees, invariants, and traversal and accepts only runnable changed-case evidence, explicit limitations, and named browser, filesystem, parser, template, validator, host, CDN, DNS, and production transfer gates. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for typed source-mapped document tree. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and ev…
objectives: Distinguish scanning, tokenization, block parsing, inline parsing, tree construction, transformation, validation, and rendering.
Model document, block, inline, text, code, link, image, and error nodes with explicit payload and children invariants.
Retain source path, line, column, byte or code-point span, and original excerpt through transformations.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-static-site-python cumulative production static-site generator portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python parser, route, render, graph, and publication models
with original fixed in-memory fixtures only. Native filesystems, full CommonMark, markdown-it-py,
Jinja, validators, browsers, GitHub Actions, Pages, DNS, TLS, CDN caches, and production effects
require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class PublicationPolicy:
    base_path: str = "/handbook/"
    encoding: str = "utf-8"
    raw_html_allowed: bool = False
    max_document_bytes: int = 262_144
    max_nesting_depth: int = 64


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class BuildEvidence:
    revision: str
    content_manifest_digest: str
    route_manifest_digest: str
    artifact_digest: str
    accessibility_review_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python static-site generator portfolio ready"

steps.title: Static-site publishing and Python Parse Phases · changed case · Quiz Parse Phases
steps.instruction:
quiz case — A quiz publishing team handles case 3540 during an offline-first field documentation build. Build deterministic Python evidence to construct a source-mapped acyclic document tree under a depth budget; test empty, malformed, deeply nested, Unicode, collision, unsafe URL, missing asset, stale cache, rejected, and recovery cases; then delete a source and change a shared layout, then compare incremental and clean artifact digests. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real filesystems, full CommonMark, markdown-it-py, Jinja, validators, browsers, GitHub Actions, Pages, DNS, TLS, CDN caches, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. At Static-site publishing and Python Diagnose the hidden failure · Quiz Visitor Transform, trace this concrete input and predict admission, decoding, tokenization, parsing, transformation, routing, rendering, validation, publication, failure, rollback, and recovery evidence before reviewing it: A quiz publishing team handles case 2203 during a project-subpath GitHub Pages deployment. Build deterministic Python evidence to construct a source-mapped acyclic document tree under a depth budget; retain reader, content owner, revision, configuration, source, parser, route, artifact, deployment, and result identity; then insert malformed nested delimiters and retain later valid content with a located diagnostic. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real filesystems, full CommonMark, markdown-it-py, Jinja, validators, browsers, GitHub Actions, Pages, DNS, TLS, CDN caches, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Traverse and transform nodes without mutating shared input or losing identity, order, diagnostics, and provenance.

stimulus.title: Visitor Transform failure evidence
stimulus.caption: A plausible visible result conflicts with the governing contract and requires a cause-level repair.

lines.label: observed
lines.text: A visitor may change child lists while iterating without observable risk.

lines.label: required
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Traverse and transform nodes without mutating shared input or losing identity, order, diagnostics, and provenance.

options.text: Run the boundary case, inspect the actual mechanism, then accept or repair the claim.
Accept the result because visible output is the highest authority. That claim does not survive the diagnose the hidden failure evidence boundary.

For diagnose the hidden failure, render one trusted short page at the root, omit content authority, source spans, parser limits, route base, URL and asset reconciliation, contextual encoding, accessibility, clean-build comparison, deployment, rollback, recovery, and production transfer, then accept plausible HTML as publication proof.

steps.title: Static-site publishing and Python Defend one difficult decision · Quiz Visitor Transform
steps.instruction:
Write the quiz evidence note for Visitor Transform: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A quiz publishing team handles case 1298 during a large technical reference incremental rebuild. Build deterministic Python evidence to construct a source-mapped acyclic document tree under a depth budget; reconcile content, routes, navigation, links, assets, feeds, sitemaps, output files, and artifact digests before approval; then replace a trusted author fixture with untrusted raw HTML, unsafe URLs, and an active SVG. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real filesystems, full CommonMark, markdown-it-py, Jinja, validators, browsers, GitHub Actions, Pages, DNS, TLS, CDN caches, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Traverse and transform nodes without mutating shared input or losing identity, order, diagnostics, and provenance.

Evidence target: Static-site publishing and Python Defend one difficult decision · Quiz Visitor Transform.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide. For Static-site publishing and Python Defend one difficult decision · Quiz Visitor Transform, keep Visitor Transform connected to executable Python source, parse, route, render, accessibility, artifact, deployment, and recovery decision evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Traverse and transform nodes without mutating shared input or losing identity, order, diagnostics, and provenance.
